name: Cushion First
description: Build liquidity before you pretend you are an investor. Best when life still feels unstable.

name: Steady Builder
description: Keep a decent cash floor, invest regularly, and avoid letting debt quietly win.

name: Debt Crusher
description: Use extra margin to kill debt first, even if it delays wealth-building and makes the month feel tighter.

name: Market Chaser
description: Push more money into long-term upside and accept that a bad month can hit harder if your life is already fragile.
